titleStmt.title: SII 27.389: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 386. (A.R. No. 254 of 1931-32.) KACHCHŪRU, (KŌTAKĒRI) UDIPI TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Broken slab (No. 4) lying near the hōmakuṇḍa in the Pañchaliṅgēśvara temple.

This record, in characters of about the 15th century, registers a grant of money to Haṁparasa by Viṭharasa-oḍeya. It refers to Kōṭeyakēri and to god Pañchaliṅgadēva. Karaṇika Mallarasa of Bārakūru wrote the record.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
ruku śākheya Āślāyana sū
vritiyali koṭa silā sāṣanada kramave
ra grāmada voḷagaṇa Aliṁjada voḷage Ara
yada hoṁnina voḷage nāvu kōṭeyakēryya halara
naḍasi koṁḍu Anubhavisuva bāḷa teṟu mu 40 me
gāgi koṭṭa varaha ga 3170 Akṣaradalu muvattuvoṁdu
hoṁnu Aṟuhaṇavanu sōmōparāga puṇyaṁkāladalu sahiraṁ
ṇyōdaka dānadhārāpūrvakavāgi dhāreyaneṟadu koṭevu yi
hoṁnanu kālakālake tapada naḍasikoṁḍu niṁma saṁtānapāraṁ
pareyogi bāḷuviri yeṁdu viṭharasavoḍeyaru haṁparasarige sōmō
parāgapuṁṇyakāladalu dhāreyaneradu koṭevu yi hoṁnanu tappa
de naḍasikoṁḍu Acaṁdrārkka sthāyigaḷāgi sukhadalu Anubhavisi
baharuyeṁdu viṭharasa voḍeyaru haṁparasarige sōmōparāga
puṇyakāladalu sahiraṁṇyōdaka dāna dhārakapūrvvakavā
gi dhāreyaneradu koṭṭa śilāsāṣana yi sāṣanadali barada ho
ṁnanu niṁma saṁtāna pāraṁpareyogi nīvē bāḷuviralade voṁdu
kēriya halaru vobba seṭṭi salladu dānapālanayōrmmadhyē dā
nāśrēyōnu pālanaṁ dānāt svarga mavāpyōti pālanādacutaṁ
padaṁ bārakūra karaṇika mallarasara baraha viṭharasa voḍeyara voppa
śrī śrī śrī paṁcaliṁgadēvara ṭhāvinali pārā śrī
parvatadali maneyanu kaṭṭi prītiyahoṁnaThe record stops abruptly here.
Digital edition of SII 27.389 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
